scripts.docker-auth: aws ecr get-login-password  | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin 901864772846.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
scripts.lambda-update: aws lambda update-function-code --no-cli-pager --function-name dfs-presignup --image-uri 901864772846.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/dfs/lambdas:latest && aws lambda update-function-code --no-cli-pager --function-name dfs-input-review --image-uri 901864772846.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/dfs/lambdas:latest && aws lambda update-function-code --no-cli-pager --function-name dfs-simulation --image-uri 901864772846.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/dfs/lambdas:latest && aws lambda update-function-code --no-cli-pager --function-name dfs-history --image-uri 901864772846.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/dfs/lambdas:latest
scripts.lambda-wait: aws lambda wait function-updated --function-name dfs-presignup && aws lambda wait function-updated --function-name dfs-input-review && aws lambda wait function-updated --function-name dfs-simulation && aws lambda wait function-updated --function-name dfs-history
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run docker-auth && npm run docker-build && npm run docker-tag && npm run docker-push && npm run lambda-update && npm run lambda-wait && echo 'Deploy complete!'
